name: CM_DIALOG_TEXT_BUTTONS
description: Confirmation screen with centered description and two horizontal action buttons. Simpler than Core_CM_Confirmation (no icon). Buttons have rounded corners (24px radius), support focus states, and can be navigated with arrow keys. Description centered above buttons.
visualForm: Vertically centered layout: description text at top, two rounded buttons (40px height default, 132px min width) in horizontal row below
descriptionKo: 설명 텍스트와 두 개의 가로형 액션 버튼으로 구성된 확인 화면입니다. 아이콘 없이 단순하게 구성되며, 24px 모서리 둥근 버튼을 방향키로 탐색할 수 있습니다.
descriptionEn: Confirmation screen with centered description and two horizontal action buttons. Simpler than Core_CM_Confirmation (no icon). Buttons have rounded corners (24px radius), support focus states, and can be navigated with arrow keys. Description centered above buttons.
